intro: Phymatodes lingulata, also known as Black Flowering Ash, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
